tasks.cookies: SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt COOKIES_FILE=cookie_secret.txt deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
tasks.proxy: SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt PROXY_STRING_FILE=proxy_string.txt deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
tasks.iwara: SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt IWARA_CONF_FILE=iwara.json deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
tasks.youtube: SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt YOUTUBE_API_KEY_FILE=youtube_api_key.txt deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
tasks.cache: CACHE_MAX_AGE=310 CACHE_MAX_ITEMS=1000 SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
tasks.full: CACHE_MAX_AGE=600 CACHE_MAX_ITEMS=1000 SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt COOKIES_FILE=cookie_secret.txt PROXY_STRING_FILE=proxy_string.txt IWARA_CONF_FILE=iwara.json YOUTUBE_API_KEY_FILE=youtube_api_key.txt deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
